posts.title: hexo
posts.text: nodejs 12wget https://npm.taobao.org/mirrors/node/latest-v15.x/node-v15.0.0-linux-x64.tar.gz# set PATH init 123456npm install -g hexonpm install hexo-deployer-git --savemkdir blogcd bloghexo init start 12hexo g # 生成文件hexo s # 运行服务 themes 123456git submodule add https://github.com/ppoffice/hexo-theme-icarus.git themes/icarus# _config.ymltheme: icarus# ref:https://blog.zhangruipeng.me/hexo-theme-icarus/uncategorized/icarus%E5%BF%AB%E9%80%9F%E4%B8%8A%E6%89%8B/#install-source
